summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Core real-site read-only task result projection slice.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/conformance test`; `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm conformance`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-226 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-226 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-226 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is limited to real-site read-only result projection and failure recording for Core #225; write-precheck #230, App UI, true writes, live credentials, and raw private material remain out of scope.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract maps Xiaohongshu/BOSS success and failure cases to targeted Core tests, schema fixtures, and conformance validation.
